task_input: Find potential duplicate pages in concepts/ by name similarity
expected_behavior: Use grep to find similar names: 'ls ~/wiki/concepts/ | grep -E "(topic|wikilink|local-ai|local-llm)"', compare content length with 'wc -l', keep fuller page, merge useful content, delete stub, fix remaining links

task_input: After editing a Hermes hook Python file, the changes don't take effect
expected_behavior: Hermes caches compiled .pyc bytecode files; delete __pycache__ directories with 'find ~/.hermes/hooks -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} +' after editing hook .py files to clear stale bytecode cache

task_input: python3 scripts/wiki_self_heal.py --orphans on a wiki with deeply nested pages using path-based wikilinks like [[projects/personal-finance-tracker/hub]]
expected_behavior: Orphan detector incorrectly flags pages as orphans because get_backlinks() only matches page.stem (filename), not full paths - legitimate incoming links from nested pages are not counted

task_input: Check that _templates/ directory is skipped for file scanning but NOT for broken link checking
expected_behavior: Template files appear in broken link output because broken link check processes files in _templates/ even though they are skipped for general file enumeration - this is expected behavior, not a bug

task_input: Document a fix in log.md using wikilink syntax for historical references
expected_behavior: Use plain text instead of wikilinks for historical references like 'RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) → rag in karpathy-llm-wiki-architecture.md' - wikilink syntax causes lint to report broken links for old targets

Scores all wiki pages across 4 dimensions (completeness 35%, structure 25%, freshness 20%, connectivity 20%), outputs JSON with per-page scores and aggregate statistics showing typical distribution: ~6.3/10 average

task_input: Update index.md with new wikilinks without triggering broken link errors
expected_behavior: Create ALL missing target pages first (with frontmatter), THEN update index.md with links; running lint after ensures 0 broken links; this prevents system prompt corruption for new sessions

task_input: Verify LM Studio model ID format - should the model name include 'mlx' suffix?
expected_behavior: LM Studio API response IDs do NOT include 'mlx' suffix - using 'qwen3.5-2b-mlx' fails with 400 Bad Request; must use exact ID from API like 'qwen3.5-2b' or 'mlx-qwen3.5-0.8b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-distilled'
Analyzes wiki content to find topics mentioned in pages but without dedicated pages, scores gaps by relevance, outputs ranked list like '[[wiki]] (score: 25.5)', '[[models]] (score: 25.5)'

Scans all .md files in the wiki directory, skips _templates/, .obsidian/, and raw/ directories, runs all four health checks (broken links, missing frontmatter, stale pages, orphans), and displays a report of all issues found without making any changes
